summary: Completed comprehensive testing of World Indian Business & Culture Foundation 12-page NGO website. Backend APIs and frontend functionality working well.

ui_bugs.issue: Form dropdowns have overlay interception issues preventing programmatic interaction in Playwright

integration_issues.issue: Country and interest area dropdowns can be opened but selection via automation is challenging due to portal rendering

passed_tests: Homepage hero section with CTAs displays correctly
Navigation links work for About, Leadership, Programs, Research, Media, Contact pages
All form fields render and are accessible
Responsive header with logo functions properly
Legal pages (Terms, Privacy, Disclaimer, Security, Cookies) accessible
All homepage sections render (hero, about, mission, focus areas, stats, global presence, CTA)
Backend validation working (422 errors for invalid data)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All pages load, forms render, minor dropdown automation issues)
